sourceAmbiguity: Manual-only could be interpreted as a recoverable challenge.
decisionTaken: ManualOnlyOutcome states that no continuation can be redeemed and no captured detail is shown.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: The shared contract treats manual_only as a routing outcome, not a redeemable surface.
operationalRisk: Support copy must stay specific enough without exposing request context.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Replace local practice-support wording with shared support routing copy.
